response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned full-stack engineer with a broad career spanning web, embedded, and tooling domains, but his profile is fundamentally misaligned with this role. The position requires deep JVM expertise, Kotlin, and hands-on experience with Spring and enterprise Java frameworks — none of which appear meaningfully in his resume. His primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js, with Java surfacing only incidentally at Altom and National Instruments. While his work on NI LabWindows/CVI shows some awareness of IDE tooling, it was C/C++-based and does not demonstrate the JVM internals or enterprise Java IDE development the role demands.
strengths: Demonstrated experience with IDE/tooling internals through work on NI LabWindows/CVI, a C IDE product for engineers
Strong developer tooling background including CI/CD infrastructure, MCP code generators, and open-source test frameworks
Long track record of working on complex, production systems at scale (millions of HTTP requests/sec at Sociomantic; millions of mail sends at Optilyz)
concerns: No Kotlin experience anywhere in the resume; this is a core requirement for the role
No Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or any enterprise Java framework experience mentioned
Primary programming language stack is TypeScript/Node.js — JVM expertise is effectively absent despite Java being listed in skills
